newsArray.title: Pakistan's Noman Ali Creates History, Breaks 130-Year-Old World Record
newsArray.description: Pakistan cricketer Noman Ali created history and broke a world record that stood since 1896. The 39-year-old completed 100 Test wickets during the fifth day of the first Test against Bangladesh
creator: aayush kataria
